holdings.infoBox: RCGE is an equity ETF with a total of 204 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 1.89%, Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company at 0.97%, Affirm Holdings at 0.74%, Smartgroup Corporation at 0.74%, and PharmaEssentia at 0.71%.

overview.description: The RockCreek Global Equality ETF (RCGE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of equities from developed and emerging markets, focused on firms committed to gender-balance within its company, also filtered through a fundamental screen. RCGE was launched on Feb 27, 2025 and is issued by RockCreek.
